@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@ {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-02u","title":"Build ChangelogAccordion for prompt detail pages","description":"**Details:** - Shows version history when prompt.changelog exists - Accordion expansion (collapsed by default) - Lists changes chronologically (newest first) - Version, date, and change description per entry **Changelog Type (in types.ts):** ```typescript interface PromptChange { version: string; date: string; changes: string[]; } // On Prompt interface: changelog?: PromptChange[]; ``` **Implementation:** ```typescript // apps/web/src/components/changelog-accordion.tsx interface ChangelogAccordionProps { changelog: PromptChange[]; } export function ChangelogAccordion({ changelog }: ChangelogAccordionProps) { const [expanded, setExpanded] = useState(false); if (!changelog?.length) return null; return (
{expanded && (
    {changelog.map((entry) => (
  • {entry.version} {entry.date}
      {entry.changes.map((change, i) => (
    • {change}
      • ))}
    • ))}
)}
); } ``` **Location:** apps/web/src/components/changelog-accordion.tsx **Reasoning:** Changelogs build trust and help users understand prompt evolution. Accordion keeps the UI clean while making history accessible.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:35:24.004177827-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T16:50:21.229495631-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T16:50:21.229495631-05:00","close_reason":"Created ChangelogAccordion with collapsible UI, type-specific icons/colors, and timeline styling."} {"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-08e","title":"Implement jfp list command -- Details: Lists all prompts. Filters: --category, --tag, --featured, --limit. Human output: compact table with ID, category, tags, description. JSON output: array of prompt metadata. Critical for catching integration issues between frontend components.","status":"in_progress","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:32:32.191748492-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T17:06:01.206116216-05:00","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-0d1","depends_on_id":"jeffreysprompts.com-r9m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:38:08.628822653-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu"}]} +{"id":"jeffreysprompts.com-0d1","title":"Implement end-to-end test suite (e2e/)","description":"**Details:** - Full user flow tests using Playwright - Test critical paths: search → view → copy → install - Test cross-browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari) - Test mobile viewports - Test offline mode (PWA) **Critical E2E Flows:** 1. **Search & Copy Flow:** - Load homepage - Type in search bar - Click prompt card - Click copy button - Verify clipboard content 2. **Basket & Export Flow:** - Add multiple prompts to basket - Open basket sidebar - Export as ZIP - Verify ZIP contents 3. **SpotlightSearch Flow:** - Press Cmd+K - Type query - Navigate with arrow keys - Press Enter to copy 4. **Skill Install Flow:** - Click install button - Verify command copied to clipboard 5. **Mobile Flows:** - Test touch interactions - Bottom sheet prompt detail - Swipe gestures **Logging Requirements:** - Detailed step-by-step logs - Screenshot on failure - Network request logging - Console error capture **Framework:** Playwright **Test Organization:** ``` e2e/ tests/ search-copy.spec.ts basket-export.spec.ts spotlight.spec.ts mobile.spec.ts pwa-offline.spec.ts fixtures/ ... playwright.config.ts ``` **Reasoning:** E2E tests validate entire user journeys work correctly. Implement semanticRerank(query, baseline, options) that uses MiniLM via @xenova/transformers for semantic similarity. Lazy-loads model on first use. Model cached in $HOME/.config/jfp/models. Options: fallback='hash' uses hash-embedder when model unavailable. Two-stage pipeline: BM25 → semantic rerank on top N. Catches model load errors gracefully.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-10T00:44:17.479930087-05:00","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-10T02:09:42.847392313-05:00","closed_at":"2026-01-10T02:09:42.847392313-05:00","close_reason":"Implemented semantic.ts with: (1) hash-based LSH embeddings as zero-dependency fallback, (2) @xenova/transformers integration for MiniLM (optional peer dep), (3) semanticRerank() for two-stage BM25→semantic pipeline, (4) semanticRerankHash() sync version, (5) model caching in $HOME/.config/jfp/models, (6) graceful error handling. Install prompts as skills uninstall ... Remove installed skills installed List installed skills update Update installed skills Bundles bundles List available bundles bundle show Show bundle details Registry registry status Show cache status registry refresh Force cache refresh Utilities open Open prompt in browser doctor Check environment about About this tool completion Generate shell completions EXAMPLES jfp list --category ideation --json jfp search 'readme' --limit 5 jfp install idea-wizard readme-reviser jfp render my-prompt --VAR=value DOCUMENTATION https://jeffreysprompts.com/docs ``` **Reasoning:** Comprehensive help is essential for CLI discoverability.
